name: Net Present Value Calculator
description: Industrial-grade NPV calculator with sensitivity analysis, loss driver identification, and confidence-adjusted outputs. Compliant with ISO 15686-5, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Initial Investment (CAPEX)
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and commissioning costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and commissioning costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipman, kurulum ve devreye alma maliyetleri dahil toplam başlangıç sermaye harcaması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte anfängliche Kapitalausgaben einschließlich Ausrüstung, Installation und Inbetriebnahmekosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses d'investissement totales incluant équipement, installation et mise en service.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gasto de capital total inicial, incluidos equipos, instalación y costos de puesta en marcha.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي النفقات الرأسمالية المقدمة بما في ذلك تكاليف المعدات والتركيب والتشغيل.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital reflecting the opportunity cost of capital.

label_i18n.ar: معدل الخصم (متوسط التكلفة المرجح لرأس المال)

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital reflecting the opportunity cost of capital.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sermayenin fırsat maliyetini yansıtan ağırlıklı ortalama sermaye maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewichteter durchschnittlicher Kapitalkostensatz, der die Opportunitätskosten des Kapitals widerspiegelt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen pondéré du capital reflétant le coût d'opportunité du capital.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio ponderado del capital que refleja el costo de oportunidad del capital.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط التكلفة المرجح لرأس المال الذي يعكس تكلفة الفرصة البديلة لرأس المال.

inputs.label: Project Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational lifespan of the investment per ISO 15686-5.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational lifespan of the investment per ISO 15686-5.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 15686-5'e göre yatırımın beklenen işletme ömrü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete betriebliche Nutzungsdauer der Investition gemäß ISO 15686-5.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de vie opérationnelle attendue de l'investissement selon ISO 15686-5.
businessContext_i18n.es: Vida operativa esperada de la inversión según ISO 15686-5.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمر التشغيلي المتوقع للاستثمار وفقًا للمعيار ISO 15686-5.

inputs.label: Annual Cash Inflow
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual revenue or cost savings generated by the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual revenue or cost savings generated by the investment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırım tarafından üretilen beklenen yıllık gelir veya maliyet tasarrufu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Einnahmen oder Kosteneinsparungen durch die Investition.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu annuel attendu ou économies de coûts générées par l'investissement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos anuales esperados o ahorros de costos generados por la inversión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الإيرادات السنوية المتوقعة أو توفير التكاليف الناتج عن الاستثمار.

inputs.label: Annual Cash Outflow
inputs.businessContext: Annual operating expenses, maintenance, and other recurring costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operating expenses, maintenance, and other recurring costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık işletme giderleri, bakım ve diğer tekrarlayan maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Betriebskosten, Wartung und andere wiederkehrende Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses d'exploitation annuelles, maintenance et autres coûts récurrents.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos operativos anuales, mantenimiento y otros costos recurrentes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المصاريف التشغيلية السنوية والصيانة والتكاليف المتكررة الأخرى.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated residual value at the end of project life.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated residual value at the end of project life.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proje ömrü sonunda tahmini kalıntı değer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Restwert am Ende der Projektlaufzeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur résiduelle estimée à la fin de la durée de vie du projet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor residual estimado al final de la vida del proyecto.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة المتبقية المقدرة في نهاية عمر المشروع.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate for nominal cash flow adjustments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation rate for nominal cash flow adjustments.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nominal nakit akışı ayarlamaları için beklenen yıllık enflasyon oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Inflationsrate für nominale Cashflow-Anpassungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation annuel attendu pour les ajustements de flux de trésorerie nominaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de inflación anual esperada para ajustes de flujo de caja nominal.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل التضخم السنوي المتوقع لتعديل التدفقات النقدية الاسمية.

inputs.label: Effective Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Corporate tax rate applied to net income.

businessContext_i18n.en: Corporate tax rate applied to net income.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Net gelire uygulanan kurumlar vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition des sociétés appliqué au revenu net.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa impositiva corporativa aplicada a los ingresos netos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل ضريبة الشركات المطبق على صافي الدخل.

rules.message: Project life must be greater than zero.
Annual cash inflow must be at least equal to outflow to avoid negative net cash flow.
Initial investment must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: NPV is negative. Investment may not meet required return.
Internal rate of return is below the discount rate. Project destroys value.
Payback period exceeds project life. Investment may not recover costs.
